items.briefing:
Australian organisations have been warned to start preparing for quantum computing threats to current encryption methods. While quantum cyber risks are not immediate, experts say organisations should begin assessing their exposure now, as upgrading security systems takes time. This is particularly relevant for sectors handling sensitive data over the long term, such as education and training providers.

On a positive note, privacy and security tools continue to be independently tested and verified — a reminder that when choosing software for your organisation, looking for products with third-party security audits adds an important layer of trust.

**Tip:** When evaluating any new software or app for work use, check whether it has been independently security-audited before approving it for staff.

featured.title: Australia warned over quantum cyber security risks
featured.quote: Australia's critical infrastructure faces years-long encryption vulnerability before quantum-safe upgrades complete.
